## Security & Supply Chain Checklist
- [ ] No secrets, keys, tokens, or credentials committed
- [ ] No sensitive data added to logs, configs, or debug output
- [ ] Dependencies reviewed via dependency-review CI check
- [ ] No unpinned or floating version dependencies introduced
- [ ] SBOM / provenance unaffected or updated where applicable

---

## Compliance Checklist
- [ ] DCO sign-off included (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] Conventional commit format used
- [ ] Branch protection requirements understood (1+ approval, linear history)
- [ ] No bypass of CI/CD controls introduced

---

## Quality Gates
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make test` passes (≥80% coverage maintained or justified)
- [ ] `make security-scan` passes (CodeQL / Gitleaks / SAST clean)

---

## Documentation
- [ ] README updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] ADR created/updated (if architectural change)
- [ ] Inline docs updated where necessary

---

- **Deployment impact:** None / Staging / Production
